subject: Charged twice this month
body: My card was billed two times for the same subscription this month and I only have one plan.

subject: Update the invoice email
body: Can you change the email address where monthly invoices are sent to accounting@myco.example?

subject: Question about proration
body: If I upgrade mid-cycle, how is the price prorated on the next invoice?

subject: Billing outage blocking renewals
body: Nobody on our team can complete a plan renewal. Every attempt to pay fails at the final step with a generic error and our accounts are about to lapse. I have already tried restarting the app, clearing the cache, and signing out and back in several times, but the problem keeps happening exactly the same way each time. I checked the status page and it says all systems are operational, so I do not understand why this is affecting my account specifically. This started yesterday afternoon and has continued through today. I rely on this for my daily work and the interruption is costing me real time. Please let me know what other diagnostic information would help you investigate; I am happy to provide logs, screenshots, timestamps, or anything else your team needs to get to the bottom of this quickly. subject: Wrong tax on receipt
body: The VAT on my last receipt looks wrong for my country and the total is higher than expected.

subject: Switch from monthly to annual
body: We want to move our workspace from monthly billing to the annual plan starting next cycle.

subject: Thanks, quick question on discounts
body: Loving the product so far. Do you offer a nonprofit discount on paid plans?

subject: Export produces empty file
body: Exporting a report to CSV downloads a 0-byte file every time; there is no workaround for us.

subject: Sorting glitch in table view
body: Sorting a column by date sometimes puts last month's rows above this month's until I refresh.

subject: Login loop on mobile
body: On the mobile app I get bounced back to the login screen right after entering my password.

subject: Tooltip shows wrong shortcut
body: The tooltip for the save button says Ctrl+S but the actual shortcut is Ctrl+Enter.

subject: Typo in settings label
body: Minor: the settings page says 'Notifcations' instead of 'Notifications'.

subject: Site down for our whole team
body: The dashboard returns a 500 error for everyone in our org right now and no one can work.

subject: How do I invite teammates
body: What is the step to add new members to my workspace and set their permissions?

subject: Set up SSO
body: We'd like to enable single sign-on for our team. Where do I start in the admin settings?

subject: Bulk import contacts
body: Is there a way to import several hundred contacts at once from a spreadsheet?

subject: Change timezone
body: How can I change the timezone used for due dates on my account?

subject: Recover archived items
body: Where do archived tasks go and how do I bring one back to an active list?

subject: Enable dark mode
body: Does the app have a dark theme, and if so how do I turn it on?

subject: Add recurring tasks
body: It would be great if tasks could repeat on a schedule instead of me recreating them weekly.

subject: Calendar view please
body: Love the app. A calendar view of due dates would make planning so much easier for our team.

subject: Webhook for status changes
body: Please add a webhook that fires when a ticket changes status so we can sync our tools.

subject: Custom fields on records
body: We need the ability to add our own custom fields to records for internal categorization.

subject: Keyboard shortcuts
body: Would you consider adding more keyboard shortcuts for power users? Would speed us up a lot.

subject: Export to Google Sheets
body: A direct export to Google Sheets, not just CSV, would remove a manual step for our analysts.

subject: Locked out after password reset
body: I reset my password this morning and now I cannot log in at all; it says the account is locked.

subject: 2FA device lost
body: I lost my phone and can't get past the two-factor prompt. How do I regain access to my account?

subject: Change account email
body: I need to update the primary email on my account to a new work address.

subject: Add a backup admin
body: Can I designate a second admin on our workspace in case I'm unavailable?

subject: SSO users can't sign in
body: Since this morning none of our SSO users can sign in; they get an authentication error.

subject: Refund for duplicate charge
body: I was charged twice and would like the extra charge refunded to my original payment method.

subject: Refund unused annual plan
body: I upgraded to annual by mistake right after paying monthly; can I get the annual charge refunded?

subject: Cancel and refund
body: Please cancel my subscription and refund this month; the product isn't a fit for us.

subject: Prorated refund on downgrade
body: If I downgrade now, do I get a prorated refund for the remainder of the current month?

subject: Charged after cancelling
body: I cancelled last week but was still charged today. I'd like that charge refunded, please.

subject: Refund not received
body: You approved a refund ten days ago but it still has not appeared on my statement. I've checked with my bank and there is nothing pending. I need this resolved because it was a significant amount and it is affecting my budget for the month. subject: Just saying thanks
body: No issue at all, I just wanted to say your support team was fantastic last week. Keep it up!

subject: Partnership inquiry
body: We run a complementary product and would like to explore an integration partnership. Who to contact?

subject: Press question
body: I'm a journalist writing about productivity tools; is there a media contact I could reach?

subject: Security questionnaire
body: Our procurement team needs you to fill out a standard security questionnaire before we buy.

subject: Careers question
body: Are you hiring support engineers? I couldn't find a careers page.

subject: Feedback on onboarding
body: The onboarding flow was smooth and clear. Sharing some positive feedback, no action needed.

subject: Wrong recipient
body: I think this reached the wrong inbox; I meant to email my own IT department. Please disregard.

subject: Happy to pay, need PO
body: We're glad to renew. Can you send a quote we can turn into a purchase order for our finance team?

subject: Great docs, one gap
body: Your docs are excellent. Where do I find the rate limits for the API though?

subject: Mobile widget
body: A home-screen widget for the mobile app showing today's tasks would be handy.

subject: Production API returning 500s
body: Every call to your production API has been returning HTTP 500 for the last twenty minutes. Our customer-facing app is down as a result and we are losing transactions every minute this continues. This is a full outage for us and we need an urgent status update. I have already tried restarting the app, clearing the cache, and signing out and back in several times, but the problem keeps happening exactly the same way each time. I checked the status page and it says all systems are operational, so I do not understand why this is affecting my account specifically. This started yesterday afternoon and has continued through today. I rely on this for my daily work and the interruption is costing me real time. Please let me know what other diagnostic information would help you investigate; I am happy to provide logs, screenshots, timestamps, or anything else your team needs to get to the bottom of this quickly. subject: Webhooks stopped firing entirely
body: None of our webhooks have fired since 09:00 and our downstream systems are now out of sync.

subject: Admin account taken over
body: Someone changed our admin email and locked the rest of us out; we believe the account is hijacked.

subject: Checkout failing for all customers
body: Our storefront cannot charge any customer through your billing API; every transaction errors out.

subject: Attachments fail to upload
body: Uploading any attachment over a few megabytes fails with a network error and there's no workaround.

subject: Thanks, how to archive a project
body: Really enjoying the tool. Quick one: how do I archive an old project without deleting it?

subject: Would love reminders
body: Great product overall. Reminders before a due date would make it perfect for our workflow.

subject: Kudos to the team
body: Nothing needed, just wanted to pass along kudos; the recent update is a real improvement.

subject: Refund policy details
body: Before I subscribe, could you point me to the details of your refund policy for annual plans?

subject: Add a second card
body: How do I add a backup payment card so renewals don't fail if the first one expires?

subject: Restrict member permissions
body: I want to limit what regular members can edit while letting admins change settings. How?

subject: Saved filters
body: Big fan of the app. Being able to save and share filtered views would be a fantastic addition.

subject: Search misses recent items
body: Search doesn't return items I created in the last few minutes until I hard-refresh the page.

subject: Update our company name
body: We rebranded; how do we update the company name shown on our workspace and invoices?

subject: Thanks, session length
body: Appreciate the quick help before. Can I extend how long a login session stays active?

subject: Double annual charge refund
body: We were billed for two annual plans on the same day by mistake and need one fully refunded.

subject: Consolidate two workspaces billing
body: We have two workspaces billed separately and want them merged onto a single invoice going forward.

subject: Great onboarding call
body: The onboarding call was genuinely helpful; sharing appreciation, no follow-up required.
